meaning: n.用两组纸牌的桥牌游戏
examples: DAD:Feh. Well, I'm playing canasta with some archons tonight, gotta go.
His mother, along with his sister, is the nightly host of games of kalooki, a rummy variant not unlike Brooklyn-style canasta.
In this case, the walker is a gay guy and he's a gossip and he plays canasta, and he sounds like he came out of the 1950s.
